title: aster alpinus var. fallax
intro: Aster alpinus var. fallax, also known as Alpine Aster or Fall Aster, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Aster alpinus var. fallax include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are typically used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health issues.
